concept: I'm yearning for an adventure where you play as the spirit of an unfinished novel possessing different objects to communicate with a struggling author. Manipulate household items in increasingly complex ways to inspire creative breakthroughs and provide narrative direction. Navigate between different drafts of the story, each with unique rules and limitations based on the author's changing vision. Your choices influence not only the novel's completion but also resolve the personal demons preventing the writer from finishing their masterpiece.
